_description: Hardcoded constants across ALL QP-CAT tools (excluding VAE, documented separately). Each entry explains what it controls and why it should NOT be changed. See vae_hardcoded_defaults.json for VAE-specific constants.

umap_n_components.why_not_change: Embeddings are used for 2D visualization and stored as two measurements (e.g., UMAP1, UMAP2). Changing to 3 would require 3D plotting support and a third measurement column. The ResultApplier hardcodes '1' and '2' suffixes.

random_state.description: Random seed for reproducibility across all stochastic algorithms.
random_state.why_not_change: Ensures identical results when rerunning with same parameters. Changing would make results non-reproducible and break comparison between runs.

kmeans_n_init.description: Number of KMeans initializations (best of N runs selected).
kmeans_n_init.why_not_change: Scikit-learn default. Lower values risk suboptimal clusters. Higher values are slower with diminishing returns. 10 is the established standard.

banksy_max_m.why_not_change: Higher orders capture more complex spatial patterns but increase computation exponentially. Order 1 (first-order neighbors) is sufficient for cell-level spatial analysis.

percentile_normalization_bounds.description: 1st and 99th percentile quantiles for percentile normalization.
percentile_normalization_bounds.why_not_change: Statistical convention for robust normalization. 1st/99th percentile clips extreme outliers while preserving 98% of the data distribution. Changing to 5th/95th would lose too much dynamic range.

scatter_plot_aesthetics.description: Scatter plot visual parameters for UMAP/t-SNE/PCA plots.
scatter_plot_aesthetics.why_not_change: Optimized for typical cell datasets (1k-100k cells). Larger points or higher alpha would create overlapping blobs. These could be configurable but are purely aesthetic.

gmm_n_components.description: Number of Gaussian components for GMM threshold fitting.
gmm_n_components.why_not_change: Marker expression is bimodal (negative/positive populations). 2-component GMM captures this biology. 3+ components would find subpopulations within positive cells, which is not what thresholding needs.

gamma_shift_increment.description: Small shift added to values <= 0 before gamma distribution fitting.
gamma_shift_increment.why_not_change: Gamma distribution requires strictly positive values. 0.001 is small enough to not affect the fit but large enough to avoid log(0). Standard numerical workaround.

rounding_decimals.description: Decimal places for threshold values in output.
rounding_decimals.why_not_change: 4 decimal places provide sufficient precision for normalized fluorescence values. More would be false precision. Less would lose meaningful differences.

default_gate_thresholds.description: Default gating thresholds when no per-marker gate is specified.
default_gate_thresholds.why_not_change: These are sensible midpoints: 0.5 for [0,1]-normalized data (midpoint), 0.0 for z-scored data (mean). They match the normalization method semantics. Users override these per-marker in the dialog.

model_embedding_dims.description: Output embedding dimensions for each foundation model.
model_embedding_dims.why_not_change: Fixed by the model architecture. These are NOT hyperparameters -- they are the number of features each pre-trained model outputs. Changing them would cause shape mismatches.

progress_log_interval.why_not_change: Display-only constant. Changing it has no effect on results.

shutdown_poll_interval.description: Milliseconds between checks for Python service shutdown.
shutdown_poll_interval.why_not_change: Internal polling interval. 200ms gives responsive shutdown without busy-waiting. Shorter wastes CPU. Longer delays QuPath exit.

nan_replacement.description: Value used to replace NaN/null measurements.
nan_replacement.why_not_change: Zero is the standard imputation for missing fluorescence values (absence of signal). Other values (mean, median) would require additional computation and change the data semantics.

cluster_label_prefix.why_not_change: Used throughout the codebase to identify and filter cluster labels (e.g., extractClassLabels skips names starting with 'Cluster '). Changing it would break label filtering.

debug_message_truncation.description: Maximum characters for Python debug log messages.
debug_message_truncation.why_not_change: Safety limit to prevent 25MB Appose protocol messages from flooding the log. 2000 chars captures any meaningful error message.
